title: Loud budgeting în mijlocul satului
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Bună, fetelor! Azi vă învăț 'loud budgeting'. Adică strigi în gura mare ce NU cumperi. Fără rușine!
shots.image_prompt: standing in a sunny village square with hands cupped around her mouth as if about to shout, confident playful expression, old wooden houses behind her, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she cups her hands around her mouth and leans forward as if about to shout, then grins, animated but coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Nu cumpăr pâinea aia scumpă! Să audă tot satul!
shots.image_prompt: a wide shot of a sunny Romanian village square with old wooden houses, a few hens, and a wooden bench, warm golden light, peaceful and almost empty
shots.motion_prompt: warm light over the quiet village square, a few hens pecking, a curtain swaying in a distant window, gentle ambient coherent motion, steady camera
shots.sfx: a quiet village square ambience with distant hens and a soft echo

shots.line: De ce să dau bani pe cafea la oraș? Am cicoare în grădină!
shots.image_prompt: gesturing firmly with one finger raised in a proud declaration, standing in the sunny village square, confident grin, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she raises one finger in a firm proud declaration and grins at the camera, lively coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Vecina a auzit. Acum face și ea economie. Solidaritate!
shots.image_prompt: an old wooden window with a lace curtain twitching open slightly, a red flowerpot on the sill, warm village light, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: the lace curtain twitches open slightly at the window as if someone is peeking, the flowerpot still, subtle comic coherent motion, steady camera

sfx.prompt: a wooden window creaking open softly

shots.line: Bugetul meu? Îl știe tot satul. Și popa. Și primarul.
shots.image_prompt: spreading both arms wide proudly toward the whole square as if addressing everyone, big confident grin, in the sunny village square, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she spreads both arms wide toward the square in a proud address and beams, lively coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Banii stau în ciorap. Ca la bancă. Dar mai sigur.
shots.image_prompt: a hand tucking folded banknotes into a thick grey wool sock on a rustic wooden table, warm light, close-up
shots.motion_prompt: a hand tucks folded banknotes into the wool sock and pats it twice, slow deliberate coherent motion, shallow focus
shots.sfx: fabric rustling and two soft pats, quiet room ambience

shots.line: Loud budgeting? Eu o fac de cincizeci de ani. Doar acum are nume.
shots.image_prompt: crossing her arms with a satisfied proud smile, standing in the sunny village square, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she crosses her arms and gives a satisfied proud smile to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like dacă și voi strigați ce nu cumpărați! Tare, fetelor! Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: waving cheerfully with both hands in the sunny village square, big grin, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves cheerfully with both hands and blows a kiss to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
